studyName: UCLA/Gabriella Miller Kids First Disorders of Sex Development Study

tables.description: Subject ID, subject source, source subject ID, affection status, and consent group of participants with or without sex development disorders and involved in the "Disorders/Differences of Sex Development (DSD) Study Performed at UCLA in Collaboration with the DSD-Translational Research Network (DSD-TRN), with the Support of the Gabriella Miller Kids First Pediatric Research Program" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID, family ID, father, mother, and sex of participants with or without sex development disorders and involved in the "Disorders/Differences of Sex Development (DSD) Study Performed at UCLA in Collaboration with the DSD-Translational Research Network (DSD-TRN), with the Support of the Gabriella Miller Kids First Pediatric Research Program" project.

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Legal sex of subject at time of sample collection

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, source sample ID, and sample use variable of participants with or without sex development disorders and involved in the "Disorders/Differences of Sex Development (DSD) Study Performed at UCLA in Collaboration with the DSD-Translational Research Network (DSD-TRN), with the Support of the Gabriella Miller Kids First Pediatric Research Program" project.

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, body site where sample was obtained, tumor status of sample, and sequencing center of participants with or without sex development disorders and involved in the "Disorders/Differences of Sex Development (DSD) Study Performed at UCLA in Collaboration with the DSD-Translational Research Network (DSD-TRN), with the Support of the Gabriella Miller Kids First Pediatric Research Program" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center that conducted sequencing
